pageDescription: Calculate compound interest growth over time with regular contributions for investments, savings, and loan scenarios

definition.title: Compound Interest Definition
definition.description: Interest calculated on initial principal and accumulated interest from previous periods

power.title: Power of Compounding
power.description: Time and interest rate significantly impact final investment value

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides compound interest estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual investment returns may vary based on market conditions and fees

importantNotesList: The longer the time period, the more dramatic the compounding effect
Higher interest rates lead to exponential growth over time
Regular contributions significantly boost final investment value
Consider inflation and taxes when evaluating real returns

messages.enterInformation: Enter your investment information to calculate compound interest growth
messages.resultMessage: Your compound interest calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides compound interest estimates based on mathematical formulas. Actual investment returns may vary based on market conditions, fees, taxes, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized investment advice and financial planning, consult financial advisors or investment professionals with expertise in portfolio management and individual financial circumstances.

errors.principal: Please enter a valid initial principal amount
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid annual interest rate
errors.timePeriod: Please enter a valid time period
errors.contributionAmount: Please enter a valid contribution amount

tooltips.interestRate: Annual interest rate or expected return
tooltips.timePeriod: Length of time for investment growth
tooltips.compoundFrequency: How often interest is compounded per year
tooltips.contributionTiming: Whether contributions are made at beginning or end of period

enter_investment_details_to_see_growth_p: Enter investment details to see growth projection
